title: Kopi tea
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Kopi tea''' was a type of [[Tea/Legends|tea]] with a dark and slightly orange appearance that many species considered delicious.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]''
